Certainly! Here's a draft for the article or blog post summarizing the juggling challenge:

---

**Celebrating Community Spirit: Announcing the Winners of the love.fútbol x All in for Sport x poidh Juggling Challenge 🏆**

The stage was set, videos were submitted, and after 24 hours of intense deliberation, the votes have been tallied. We are thrilled to announce the winner of the love.fútbol x All in for Sport x poidh juggling challenge!

🏆 **Grand Prize Winner: @Defi_doc1 on X**

Hailing from Port Harcourt, Nigeria, @Defi_doc1 captivated the judges with a heartwarming video showcasing his local field. The love.fútbol team remarked, "We chose this because they spoke about how well loved the space is, where the community comes together to play, and shared about how the funds could help to improve upon the space and help purchase boots for the players." His wonderful submission not only highlighted the local passion for football but also inspired with its vision for community development.

🎉 **Grand Prize Details**: The winner will receive a grand prize of $350 in ETH, courtesy of @base.base.eth. This prize will be claimable 48 hours after receiving confirmation from additional contributors @shanny and @lewwwk 🗳️.

🥈 **Congratulations to Our Runner-Ups!**

In addition to the grand prize, we are awarding $25 each to two fantastic runner-ups:
- @wimpydwi on X
- @heiszeno

Both submissions stood out with their creativity and depiction of the vibrant football culture.

🎁 **All Participants Are Winners!**

We are excited to announce that all legitimate submissions will receive $5 in Nerite USND, powered by our @flowstatecoop development rewards on @arbitrum. It’s our way of saying thank you to everyone who helped showcase the importance of community spaces.

**A Future Full of Opportunities**

This challenge demonstrated the power of on-chain incentives to foster appreciation for community spaces globally. As we look toward the future, we are committed to continuing this journey. With the 2026 World Cup on the horizon, we anticipate many more opportunities for football enthusiasts to earn and engage through poidh.

**Thank You**

We extend our deepest gratitude to all who contributed, promoted, and participated in this bounty. Your passion and creativity have made this challenge a success, and we are eager to see how we can further drive positive change in communities worldwide through football.

Stay tuned for future collaborations and opportunities with love.fútbol, All in for Sport, and poidh. The world is watching, and together, we are making a difference.

---
